titleStmt.title: SII 38.127: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 127. (A.R. No. 127 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Records a sale of 2038 kuḻi of land by the ūrār of Vēśhāṟṟupaḍiyūr in Puḻalnāḍu in Jayaṅkoṇḍachoḻa-maṇḍalam to Āriya-ammai, the wife of Prābhākara Bhaṭṭaṉ of Meṟkaḷāpura in Ārya-dēsa. The land was exempted from taxes after receiving gold from the donor.

The donation was made in order to feed the devotees māyēśvaras who thronged to the maṭha called Rājēndrachōḻan, constructed by the above donor. Peruñjittiraṉaṇḍāṇ and others figure as signatories to the document.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhirājadevarkku yāṇṭu mu(o)ṉṟāvatuIt may be read muppattoṉṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟkoṭṭattu puḻalnāṭṭu veṣṣāṟu paṭiyūr Ūrom Ūrkkuc camain=ta poruñciṟṟuḻāṉ paṭaṉṉum taḷiyuḷ niṉai talai Uṭaiyārkkut tiruppaṇi ceytirukkum Āriyavammai Eṭuppitta rājentracoḻaṉukku maṭappuṟamāka Aṟṟaikkaṉṟum van=ta śrīmāyeśvararai Amutu cey
vitta Āriyatecattu meṟkaḷāpurattu prabhākarapaṭṭaṉ brāhmaṇi na paicāraniyān Āriyavammaipakkaṟ poṉ koṇṭu Iṟaiyiḻicci nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilam Iraviccāni yāṉappivuṭpaṭṭa Iṉnilattukku mel pāṟkellai ppāli ceṟuviṟ kiḻvarampukkuk kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai kiḻakku ṉokkip poṉa vāykkālukkut teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai piṇavatikku meṟkum teṉpāṟke
llai tiruvaraṅkaṉ vaṭavarampu kiḻakku nokkina vatikkum vaṭakkum Iṉnāṉkellai cāṇkolāl Āyirattaiñṉūṟṟuppatteṭṭum kālukkuk kuttaṉ ceṟuvukku melpārkellai vāḻiya teva tāṉamāṉa nilattuk kiḻ varampukkuk kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai mukkāṇi ceṟuviṟ teṉvarampuṟkum meṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai piṇavatikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kiḻakku nokkip pā
yn=ta vāykkālukku vaṭakkum Iṉnāṉkellaiyuḷḷum Uṭppaṭa nilam patiṉaṟu cāṇkolāl nāṉūṟṟu Orupatteṭṭum Iraṇṭu kūṟṟilum nilam Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟip patinaṟu cāṇkolāl Iraṇṭāyirattu muppatteṭṭukkuḻiyum Iṉnilattukku Eṅkaḷur Erinir tiruvaraṅkaṉ maṭai niṉṟum Eri vaṭakaraiyai ceṉṟu Appāvi ceṟuviṟ kiḻvarampil meṟke ceṉṟu pāyap peṟuvatākavum Ivve
riyil nir Ivvāykkāl vaḻiye kūṭaikku kuṟṟettañ mi Iṟaittuk koḷḷap peṟuvatākavum Iṉnilam payir ceyvārkkuk kuṭiyirukkap peṟṟā naṅkaiyerikkut teṟku kiḻkai miṟai patiṉkolum teṉkai vaṭakai paṉṉiru kolumāka van=ta kuḻi ṉūṟṟirupatum Iṉnilam Uṭpaṭap peṟuvilai kāṇaṅ kiḻikaiyyiṟ cellak koṇṭu viṟṟuk kuṭuttom veḻcāṟupaṭiyūr Ūrom Iṉ
nilattu kuṭi Iruntu Iṉnilam payir ceyvāṉ koyilvācal pon=ta kuṭimai Eppeppa(pa)ṭṭatellām kāṭṭappeṟātomāṉom Oru kālāvatum Iru kālāvatum mukkālāvatum peṟuvilaikkāṇaṅ kiḻikaiyyiṟ cellak koṇṭu Iṉnilattukku van=ta Iṟai Epperp paṭṭatum nāṅkaḷe Iṟuppatāka Iṟaiyili Uṇṇappeṟuvatāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttom veḻcāṟupaṭiyūr Ūrom peṟṟāṇaṅkai Eriyum Ēri
karaiyuṅ karaipāṭum UppaṭaRead uṭpaṭaĀriyavammaikaḷukkut tāṉamākak kuṭutteṉ peruñcittiraṉaṇṭaṉ māyān=tiraneṉ Āvaṇaṅ kaiyyeḻutineṉ peruñciṟṟūḻāṉ māyān=tiraneṉ I
ppaṭi Aṟiveṉ taḷiyāṉ nirañcinaṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Amutaṉ cirāḷaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiven Erikiḻāṉ kuravaṉ ceṭṭaneṉ .
Digital edition of SII 38.127 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
